TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: NA = Non-Medicaid 

00 = Not enrolled in Medicare for the 
month 

01 = Qualified Medicare Beneficiary 
(QMB)-only 

02 = QMB and full Medicaid coverage, 
including prescription drugs 
 03 = Specified Low-Income Medicare 
Beneficiary (SLMB)-only 

04 = SLMB and
